Back to tours

Coffee and Chocolate Tour

Guided tour at a family farm near Arenal Volcano to learn the coffee, chocolate, and sugarcane process with tastings.

Duration: 2.5 hours

Location: La Fortuna, Costa Rica

Difficulty: Easy

Price: $60

CoffeeChocolateCultural tourGastronomic experienceSustainabilityOrganic farmingArenal VolcanoLa FortunaRural tourismFamily
Book via WhatsApp

Description

Discover the rich heritage of coffee and chocolate production on a guided tour in La Fortuna, Costa Rica. Experience the journey from seed to cup near the scenic Arenal Volcano. Dive into the world of coffee and chocolate at North Fields Coffee, a family farm nestled in the lush landscapes of La Fortuna near Arenal Volcano. Begin your visit with a warm welcome from expert guides passionate about sustainable agriculture. During the tour, you will learn organic farming techniques first hand, experience traditional sugarcane processing, taste freshly made coffee and chocolate, and learn about the local fauna that supports the organic cultivation process.

What to expect

  • Guided visit to a family farm near Arenal Volcano.
  • Learn the coffee, chocolate, and sugarcane process.
  • Tastings of freshly made coffee and chocolate.
  • Focus on sustainable agriculture and local fauna.

Includes

  • Guide
  • Coffee
  • Chocolate tasting
  • Sugarcane tasting
  • Water
  • Local taxes
  • Hotel pick up and drop off service (no more than 15 minutes from the La Fortuna area)

Tour Description

Discover the rich heritage of coffee and chocolate production on a guided tour in La Fortuna, Costa Rica. Experience the journey from seed to cup near the scenic Arenal Volcano. Dive into the world of coffee and chocolate at North Fields Coffee, a family farm nestled in the lush landscapes of La Fortuna near Arenal Volcano. Begin your visit with a warm welcome from expert guides passionate about sustainable agriculture. During the tour, you will learn organic farming techniques first hand, experience traditional sugarcane processing, taste freshly made coffee and chocolate, and learn about the local fauna that supports the organic cultivation process.

Includes:

  • Guide
  • Coffee
  • Chocolate tasting
  • Sugarcane tasting
  • Water
  • Local taxes
  • Hotel pick up and drop off service (no more than 15 minutes from the La Fortuna area)
